/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/client_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/aes_crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/union_find.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/data_preprocessor.cpp.o -o fed_client  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lpthread libfed_cuda.a /usr/local/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
